title: Madoku Craft: Smelting
description: Madoku Craft: Smelting is a configurable smelting system. It allows users to adjust furnace smelting speed and fuel efficiency.
body:
Madoku Craft: Smelting is a configurable smelting system. It allows users to adjust furnace smelting speed and fuel efficiency. The system also allows for furnaces to accept additional inputs.

![Smelting System](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/33e86096d6ceafd857e285fde73d73d14557cb21.gif)

## Dependencies:

- Fabric API
- Madoku Craft API

## Implementation:

- This MOD by default increases the smelting speed for all furnaces.
- Smokers and Blast Furnaces are now more fuel efficient.
- You can customize these features in the CONFIG files.
